title: zornia filifoliola
intro: Zornia filifoliola, also known as the "Mexican tick clover" or "hairy leaf zornia," is a perennial legume native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Zornia filifoliola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, among other uses. In herbal preparations, Zornia filifoliola is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
